title: try_load_wallet_fvks derives wrong FVKs: passes ZIP-32 master key to from_seed
description: wallet.key stores master.as_bytes() = ZIP-32 master key (BLAKE2b output). try_load_wallet_fvks passes these 64 bytes to SaplingExtendedSpendingKey::from_seed and OrchardSpendingKey::from_seed, which each apply BLAKE2b-512 again internally (master() / from_zip32_seed()). The resulting FVKs are double-derived and do not correspond to the wallet's actual key tree. Every payment address generated will be unreachable — payers send ZEC to an address the wallet can never spend. Tests miss this because test_wallet_fvks() constructs WalletFvks directly from the raw BIP-39 seed, bypassing try_load_wallet_fvks entirely.
